features.name: Project setup
features.behavior: The project installs, verifies, and starts from a clean checkout; harness/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md and this feature list exist and are committed
features.evidence: commit 472f666; ./init.sh passing 2026-07-04: Postgres healthy, lint + typecheck clean, boundary checks pass, 7/7 tests, next build OK

features.name: Meniu produse (catalog)
features.behavior: Un client deschide site-ul pe telefon și vede categoriile și produsele cu prețuri, mărimi (pizza 30/40/XXL) și descrieri, încărcate din PostgreSQL — cu meniul real importat (seed) de pe site-ul Metro dish existent
features.evidence: commits 307601d..36cf598 (T02-T06); npm test -- tests/menu: 6/6 passing 2026-07-04 (idempotency, sorting, multi-size pizza, active-filtering, API contract); ./init.sh green incl. db:migrate; 08-quickstart.md flows 1-4 executed 2026-07-04 on 375px viewport + curl (13 categories/73 products/117 variants, prices integer bani, inactive product hidden from page+API, double seed = no duplicates)

features.name: Coș și plasare comandă
features.behavior: Un client alege produse (mărime, topping-uri, ambalaj obligatoriu), vede coșul cu totalul calculat pe server (subtotal + SGR + taxă livrare pe zonă, gratuită peste prag), alege livrare sau ridicare personală, ASAP sau oră programată în orar, completează datele ca guest și plasează comanda cu plata la primire; comanda apare în baza de date cu status «nouă». Ordering-ul se implementează ca serviciu, apelabil de orice canal (DECISIONS.md 2026-07-04)
features.evidence: commits eda26d0..T10 on feat/006-cos-comanda; npm test -- tests/orders: 22/22 passing 2026-07-04 (per-size pricing, SGR separate line, zone fee below/at threshold on 2 zones, pickup no-fee, delivery+pickup+scheduled happy paths with DB snapshot assertions, atomic rollback, RESTRICT guard, all 422 reason codes); ./init.sh green incl. build with all 5 new routes; 08-quickstart.md flows 1-5 executed 2026-07-04 on 375px preview — live orders #13 (delivery Sancraiu, fee 3000, total 7000, phone normalized, IP stored) and #19 (pickup 25 min, card_restaurant, sgr 50, no fee)

features.name: Panou admin: produse și comenzi
features.behavior: Personalul restaurantului se autentifică (roluri admin/angajat), vede comenzile noi în timp real cu semnal sonor până la preluare, le duce prin stări (preluată / în livrare / gata de ridicare / finalizată / anulată cu motiv, cu undo), reglează estimarea per comandă la preluare și administrează meniul (disponibilitate — și angajat; prețuri, produse/categorii noi, ingrediente/alergeni — admin), zonele de livrare și orarul (admin); seed-ul nu mai suprascrie modificările din panou
features.evidence: commits d0732be..063f629 + T15 on feat/007-panou-admin (T01 schema 0004, T02-T03 auth+shell, T04-T05 status graph+order services, T06 DB settings, T07-T10 catalog/zones admin API, T11 seed guard, T12-T14 UI); npm test -- tests/admin: 46/46 passing 2026-07-05 (auth+sessions+rate limit, Q14 role matrix both directions, transitions+estimate+cancel+undo, two-devices race 409, catalog edits vs menu/quotes, zones, settings, seed guard both directions with real seed runs); full suite 112/112, ./init.sh green; 08-quickstart.md flows 1-9 executed live in browser 2026-07-05 (orders #275 pickup and #276 delivery through full lifecycle incl. cancel+undo, race order #325, price/text/availability edits reflected in shop, new product ordered end-to-end, zone fee change in next quote, schedule edit live in GET /api/schedule, staff vs admin walk); remaining human check: hear the actual alert tone on the restaurant device

features.name: Asistent AI pe site (chat)
features.behavior: Un client deschide chat-ul de pe site, întreabă în limbaj natural despre meniu (ex: 'ce pizza picantă aveți?') și poate plasa o comandă prin conversație; asistentul folosește EXCLUSIV serviciile existente (meniu, coș, comenzi) prin tool-calling. Probabil se sparge în sub-feature-uri la spec time
features.evidence: T01-T10 on worktree branches claude/distracted-jang-33b090 (T01-T05) + claude/strange-hopper-b16056 (T06-T10, through 1d8a87b); npm test -- tests/assistant: 43 passed + live smoke on the real key 2026-07-06 (provider types, storage+retention, tool loop with round cap, cart bridge incl. current-cart context, place_order + confirmation gating, all 422 limit codes, 503 degradation, route layer); full suite 156/156, ./init.sh green incl. build with f /api/assistant; 08-quickstart.md flows 1-8 executed 2026-07-06 against the REAL API (claude-opus-4-8) at 375px: menu Q&A RO/HU/EN with 24 prices spot-checked exact vs DB, allergens with-data vs no-data (no invention), shared cart both directions (site-edit visibility fixed @ 1d8a87b during execution), full chat order #821 placed only after explicit confirmation and visible in the admin day view identical to a web order (phone normalized, server totals, terms accepted), out-of-hours 23:30 refused with the real schedule, off-topic + manager-discount injection refused, 501-char message 400; test order/conversations/staff user cleaned up after

features.name: Canale externe: WhatsApp / Telegram
features.behavior: Un client scrie restaurantului pe WhatsApp sau Telegram și primește același asistent conversațional (meniu, întrebări, plasare comandă) — adaptoare noi peste același nucleu de servicii, fără logică duplicată
features.verification: (defined at spec time) adapter integration tests + manual conversation on each channel

features.name: Conturi clienți și login social
features.behavior: Un client își poate crea cont opțional (email+parolă sau login Google în v1; Facebook/TikTok amânate — Q1), rămâne autentificat, datele lui de livrare se precompletează la checkout și își vede comenzile proprii cu status (Q2); comenzile guest anterioare se leagă după telefon/email (Q3/Q5, risc acceptat, verificare amânată); guest checkout rămâne disponibil și neschimbat. Decis de proprietar la interviul feat-006 (2026-07-04), detaliat 2026-07-06
features.evidence: commits 67d317a..25db8f6 (T01–T10; history rewritten 2026-07-06 to strip co-author trailers before merge) on feat/010-conturi-clienti (T01 shared auth primitives, T02 schema 0006 + customers repo, T03 order ownership stamp/claim/reads, T04 customer-auth service, T05 Google OIDC module, T06 account service, T07 /api/account/* routes, T08 checkout stamping + fill-the-gaps absorb, T09 /cont UI + prefill, T10 ops + quickstart); npm test -- tests/accounts: 43/43 passing 2026-07-06 (hashed-only passwords, sessions rolling+invalidation, rate limit 429, Google resolution via injected exchange incl. unverified-email refusal, claim by phone/email + first-claim, isolation both directions, guest regression, route layer incl. cookies and google redirects); ./init.sh green (198 tests; assistant live smoke skips — key revoked by owner); 08-quickstart.md flows 1-5 executed 2026-07-06 at 375px — signup+auto-login (#433, scrypt-only in DB), silent checkout prefill, order #1156 stamped at insert + D-h absorb into empty profile, status «În livrare» via 15s polling without refresh, logout/re-login, guest order #1157 claimed by phone at register with 404 cross-customer isolation, guest placement customer_id NULL, no-Google degradation (no button + google/start 503), password-recovery CLI (old 401 / new 200); test data cleaned up after; remaining owner check: real Google round-trip (Flow 6) once the owner creates the Google Cloud OAuth client — deterministic Google paths already test-covered

features.name: Cupoane de reducere
features.behavior: Un client introduce un cod de cupon în coș și reducerea (procent / sumă fixă / livrare gratuită — Q1) se aplică DOAR la subtotalul produselor (Q2; SGR și taxa de livrare neatinse), calculată pe server la cotare și re-validată la plasare; cupoanele au perioadă de valabilitate + activ/inactiv (Q3 — limite de utilizare amânate, risc de refolosire acceptat) și se administrează doar de rolul admin (Q4); comanda stochează codul + reducerea, vizibile în panou. Scos explicit din feat-006 la interviul din 2026-07-04, detaliat la interviul din 2026-07-06
features.evidence: commits f4b3746..T08 on feat/011-cupoane (spec+clarify Q1-Q4, research D1-D6 owner-approved incl. D-d, plan/data-model/contracts, T01 schema 0007 + repo, T02 admin service + schemas, T03 money engine, T04 placement snapshot, T05 admin routes, T06 admin UI, T07 shop UI, T08 quickstart); npm test -- tests/coupons: 28/28 passing 2026-07-07 (CHECKs incl. the NULL-guard lesson, value-per-type matrix, percent floor proven vs round on 4390 bani, fixed capped, free_delivery below/at threshold/pickup, D-d pre-discount threshold, validity matrix with injectable now incl. inclusive window edges, normalization end-to-end, placement snapshot + deactivated-after-quote refusal with no row, role matrix both directions on all 3 admin handlers, angajat reads a discounted order); full suite 226 passed + 1 skip (assistant live smoke, key-gated); ./init.sh green incl. build with /admin/cupoane + /api/admin/coupons*; 08-quickstart.md flows 1-7 executed 2026-07-07 at 375px in the live preview — all 3 coupon types + an expired one created via the admin UI form, angajat saw no Cupoane nav and got the access message on the direct URL, guest order #1687 placed with vara10→VARA10 (cart 36.00, checkout 66.00 with Sancraiu fee, DB row coupon_id/code/discount_bani=400/total=6600, discount line visible to the angajat in the panel), SUPER50 capped at -40.00 with 0.00 products total, TRANSPORT0 showed «gratuita (cupon)» with no double line, EXPIRAT/NUEXISTA dropped with per-code messages and intact cart; test data cleaned up (order, coupons, temp staff #172/#173, open_minutes restored)

features.name: Plată online cu cardul
features.behavior: Un client își poate plăti comanda online cu cardul la checkout, pe lângă plata la primire; plata confirmată se leagă de comandă. Cerut de proprietar la interviul feat-006 (2026-07-04); DECISIONS.md o listează deja ca v2
features.verification: (defined at spec time) integration tests against payment provider sandbox + manual end-to-end payment
